Go straight and turn left.
It is sunny today.
How much is the coffee?
She is tall and has long hair.
Hi, Erica! How is the weather today?
It is sunny and warm. I want to go to the store.
The store is near. Go straight and turn left at the corner.
Thank you. Is the store cheap or expensive?
It is cheap. You can ask: how much is the bread?
Perfect. And the man at the store, what is he like?
He is tall and very friendly. He has short hair.
Great. I go now, before it is cloudy. Thank you, David!
Go straight and turn left at the corner.
Today it is sunny and warm.
The man is tall and friendly.
The store is cheap, not expensive.

Hi, this is David. Let me tell you about my Saturday. In the morning it is sunny, so I walk to the store near my house. To get there, I go straight and turn left at the corner. The store is not expensive, so I buy bread, fruit, and coffee. The man at the store is tall and very friendly. In the afternoon it is cloudy and cold, so I stay at home. This is my simple Saturday.

Hello, this is Maria. Today the weather is windy and a little cold. I need to go to the store, but it is far. I take the bus to the center. I get off near the station and walk straight for two minutes. At the store I ask: how much is this jacket? It is expensive, so I buy a cheap one. My friend Ana is there too. She is short, with long hair, and she is very kind. We have coffee together. It is a nice day.
First, talk about the weather today. Second, say where you go and how you get there. Third, say what you buy at the store. Fourth, describe a person you meet. Fifth, say goodbye.
